title: Sales Engineer
description:
Jobs & Responsibilities:


1. Maintain existing customers' accounts and resourceful in developing new accounts.

2. Respond to customers' enquiries, follow-up and provide technical solutions to clients.

3. Compiling and review contractual quotation for existing and new products as per customer's enquiries.

4. Provide regular update to customers on project development in a timely manner.

5. Work closely among inter-departments to ensure committed schedules are met.

6. Prepare monthly sales input / output and having keen interest and confident in pursuing sales targets.

7. Initiate and develop good customer service and rapport with customer and always to serve customer.

8. Analyse profit / loss projects and providing cost control and cost effectiveness strategy.

9. Participate the implementation of risk assessment and risk control of medical devices

1. Preferred to have NTC / Diploma in Mechanical / Manufacturing Engineering field or equivalent.

2. Preferably with 3 to 6 years relevant experience and proven track record in industrial sales and contract manufacturing industry.

3. Preference to be given to those with work experience in CNC Precision Engineering / Fabrication / Sheetmetal Industry.

4. Customer driven, result oriented, resourceful and independent.

5. Possess excellent interpersonal communication skills and is an effective team player who is also self driven wih a strong achievement orientation.

6. Must possess class 3 driving license and own vehicle.

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1992, A & ONE Precision Engineering relies on over 30 years of experience in the industry to deliver world-class engineering solutions across multiple sectors. As a ONE-STOP solution for all your engineering needs, we offer a comprehensive range of engineering services, including precision machining, sheet metal fabrication, frame structural weldment, sub-module assembly and complete turnkey projects.


Since our founding in 1992, A & ONE has embarked on a remarkable journey. We began our operations in Defu Lane, transitioned to Ubi, and now proudly call Loyang home.  In 2006, we took a significant step by establishing a new site in Tuas, and in 2016, we further expanded our presence, extending our reach to Malaysia, Indonesia, and China.


Our growth story is not just about expanding our physical footprint; it is about fostering strong partnerships, building trust with our customers, and embracing innovation to excel. These values, along with our dedicated and talented people, have been at the heart of our success.  We believe that by collaborating closely with our partners, earning the trust of our valued customers, continually innovating, and recognizing our people as the key to our success, we can achieve new heights of excellence.
postedCompany.name: A & ONE PRECISION ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
